pipeline_mode.meta_reasoning: Standard adaptive mode — complexity 3 means full pipeline, no fast-track.

jit.enabled.meta_reasoning: All files are identified upfront from the roadmap spec. No just-in-time context loading needed — confidence 1.0.

jit.timeout.meta_reasoning: Default timeout. JIT disabled, so irrelevant.

replanning.enabled.meta_reasoning: Task is fully specified with zero ambiguity. All 4 work items have explicit file lists and exact changes. No replanning needed.

replanning.max_cycles.meta_reasoning: Default preserved but replanning is disabled.

fast_track.enabled.meta_reasoning: Composite complexity 3 exceeds fast-track threshold of 2. Standard pipeline required.

meta_agent.confidence_threshold.meta_reasoning: Default preserved. Actual confidence is 1.0, well above threshold.

routing.enabled.meta_reasoning: Task type is refactor — routed to standard execution pipeline, no skill delegation needed.

routing.auto_select_template.meta_reasoning: No template selection needed for refactor tasks.

verification.dimension_weights.meta_reasoning: Correctness weighted highest — content loss during extraction is the primary risk. Spec alignment high because 12 precise ACs must be met. Security low — no external input handling or network code, but webhook format changes warrant minimal check.

skip_phases.meta_reasoning: All phases needed. Task has enough complexity for full research-brainstorm-spec-plan-execute-verify cycle.

approval_gates.meta_reasoning: Default gates: after brainstorm (3), after spec (4), after plan (6). All appropriate for this refactor.
